response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep Python/TypeScript proficiency, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq — aligning closely with the role’s AI-native engineering requirements. His operational ownership, open-source leadership, and cross-functional collaboration history show excellent stakeholder and agile alignment. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of Python mastery and on-call incident response, but his track record compensates.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic code generation workflows at re:cinq
Extensive distributed systems background with high-throughput, low-latency systems (e.g., DLang microservices at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational ownership evidenced by open-source project leadership and full-stack ownership across domains
concerns: Resume emphasizes TypeScript and DLang more than Python — unclear depth in Python for core system development
No explicit mention of on-call incident response or operational monitoring practices
German language proficiency is basic, which may hinder local stakeholder alignment in Berlin
